title: Self-referential array (CircularArray = CircularArray[])
description: mion array.spec.ts 'Array circular ref'. Self-referential array — handled via the always-non-inlined KindArray policy plus the isSelf branch in EmitDependencyCall (emits the inner-function-name directly, no .fn).
notes: Self-referential arrays are validated recursively — depth is bounded only by the caller-supplied value, not the type definition.
schema:
const ca = RT.circular((self) => RT.array(self));
return createValidate(ca);
